description: OpenStreetMap is a collaborative mapping platform where contributors create and maintain geographic data. The main site also provides account-based services such as editing, diary posts, GPS traces, notes, and messaging tied to OSM user accounts.
summary: openstreetmap.org exposes one documented HTTP integration surface: the OpenStreetMap API v0.6 at `https://www.openstreetmap.org/api/0.6`, with mixed public reads and OAuth 2.0-protected write/protected-read operations.
